firstGen.source: U.S. Department of Education College Scorecard, Most-Recent-Cohorts-Institution file (released April 2025).
firstGen.definition: Share of students whose parents' highest educational attainment is a high school diploma or less (Scorecard variable FIRST_GEN).
firstGen.method: Enrollment-weighted mean across institutions, using Scorecard undergraduate enrollment (UGDS) as the weight. Institutions with suppressed or missing FIRST_GEN or zero/missing UGDS were excluded.
